name: Greens and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Greens such as beet, turnip, mustard, broccoli di Rabe, or dandelions
Salt and dried red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. If using very young tender beet greens or mustard greens, stem them, chop the leaves, and sauté in 2 tablespoons olive oil with a clove of garlic until wilted.
2. Season to taste.
3. If using tougher greens, blanch for 4 minutes or until tender, then drain well and chop. Sauté only then in garlic and olive oil until heated through.
4. Season to taste.
